concept: How about a shooter where bullets don't disappear after being fired but remain suspended in the air for several seconds before resuming their trajectory? This creates dense bullet patterns that players must navigate through while setting up their own suspended bullet traps for enemies. The environment features mechanisms that can be triggered to alter gravity or create shockwaves that redirect suspended projectiles. Special ammunition types interact uniquely with the time suspension effect, such as fragmentation rounds that split into multiple projectiles upon resuming movement. The game follows a test subject in an experimental weapons facility who must escape using the very technology being developed to hunt them down.
